Table of Contents

Interface IRasterBuilderInit2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that initialize a raster builder.

[Guid("4D53F22D-3D94-41B8-9D5B-ACA99D46ECD7")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterBuilderInit2 : IRasterBuilderInit

Properties

DefaultSpatialReference 

ISpatialReference DefaultSpatialReference { get; set; }

Property Value

ISpatialReference

GeoTransformationHelper

The geographic tranformation helper object, set by the calling application, that enables the raster builder to install geotransformation method in to the system's GeoTransformationOperationSet.

IGeoTransformationHelper GeoTransformationHelper { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeoTransformationHelper

IMosaicDataset MosaicDataset { get; set; }

IMosaicDataset
